title: athyrium dolichosorum
intro: Athyrium dolichosorum, also known as the fernleaf lady fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Athyriaceae, characterized by its fern-like leaves and delicate appearance. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Consuming Athyrium dolichosorum is believed to offer several health benefits, including reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, Athyrium dolichosorum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its effectiveness and safety should be further studied.
